purpose: Generate a constrained local motion test through reviewed PR[300]-PR[302] using UFRAME 1, UTOOL 1, and PAYLOAD[1].

motionPlan.speedPolicy: Initial local test uses low-speed joint approach and 100 mm/sec linear moves.
motionPlan.terminationPolicy: Use FINE termination for each first-pass test waypoint.
motionPlan.approachRetract: PR[300] is approach, PR[301] is the test point, and PR[302] is retract.
motionPlan.clearancePolicy: Operator owns physical path clearance before upload/run.
motionPlan.recoveryPlan: Stop, hold position, and manually jog/recover if the path or PRs do not match expectation.

target.name: APPROACH
target.source: User-approved PR[300] in local test range PR[300]-PR[310]

target.name: TESTPOINT
target.source: User-approved PR[301] in local test range PR[300]-PR[310]

target.name: RETRACT
target.source: User-approved PR[302] in local test range PR[300]-PR[310]

safety.notes: User approved PR[300]-PR[310], UFRAME 1, UTOOL 1, and PAYLOAD[1] for local safe testing. Tool gates cover generation, compile, round-trip, upload, and readback only.

evidence.roboguidePlan: Optional RoboGuide/manual notes can be recorded when useful.
evidence.operatorRunPlan: Operator owns robot mode, setup, and physical run decisions.
evidence.snapshotPlan: Record before/after state and confirm no unexpected IO/register/PR/frame/tool changes.
acceptanceCriteria: Generated LS references only PR[300], PR[301], and PR[302].
Generated LS selects only UFRAME 1, UTOOL 1, and PAYLOAD[1].
Generated LS contains no generated Cartesian /POS records.
Path is reviewed before any upload/run.

generation.notes: Local test motion generation only. No upload or run is authorized by this spec alone.
